casino.default_greeting: Welcome to the Boneyard Casino. Fortune favors the bold.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our biggest spender! The VIP room is open for you.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Welcome to the Boneyard Casino. Fortune favors the bold.
rank_greetings.Vilified: We don't serve your kind here. Get out.

start.text: Welcome to the Boneyard Casino. Try your luck at the tables, or maybe you're here for other... business?

gamble.text: The tables are over there. Don't bet more than you can afford to lose... or do, I don't care.

owner.text: Let's just say we have... influential friends. Best not to ask questions.

work.text: We always need muscle. Security, collections, some 'special' jobs. Talk to the manager if you're interested.

clinic.default_greeting: Welcome. How can I help you today?

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our hero! Come in, I'll give you a full checkup free of charge.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Welcome. How can I help you today?
rank_greetings.Vilified: I don't treat people like you. Find another doctor.

start.text: Welcome to the clinic. Radiation poisoning? Bullet wounds? I'm sure we can help... for a price.

treatment.text: Let's see... Stimpaks are 50 caps, Rad-Away is 75. Major treatments cost more. What do you need?

supplies.text: Medical supplies are in high demand. I can sell you Stimpaks, Rad-Away, bandages. Best prices in town.

work.text: I could use help getting more medical supplies. Dangerous territory out there. Interested?

bunker.default_greeting: This is a secure facility. State your business.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Welcome, ally. The bunker is open to you.
rank_greetings.Neutral: This is a secure facility. State your business.
rank_greetings.Vilified: This area is restricted. Leave now.

start.text: This bunker has been here since before the war. Plenty of secrets... and dangers.

inside.text: Old tech, pre-war weapons, maybe some vaults worth of supplies. But there's also... things. Mutants, traps.

work.text: Clear out the lower levels and I'll give you a share of what we find. Deal?
